releases.description: In this release, we fixed issues from plugin review found [here](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/5229#issuecomment-2654564221).

releases.author: belindamo
releases.description:
- Add your flashcards directly in your Obsidian notes with tracking
- Review your flashcards with the best spaced repetition algorithm ever (based on thousands of Anki reviews)
- Generate flashcards from your notes using AI
releases.name: Obsidian Spaced Repetition AI 1.0.0
